heroHeadline: Honest Auto Repair You Can Count On
heroSubheadline: ASE-certified technicians, fair pricing, and work backed by a nationwide warranty.
aboutSection:
Redline Auto Repair has kept Phoenix drivers on the road for more than two decades. We built our reputation the hard way — one honest repair at a time.

Our ASE-certified technicians diagnose the real problem and tell you straight, so you never pay for work you don't need.

Every repair is backed by a nationwide 24-month / 24,000-mile warranty, because we stand behind what we do.

services.name: Diagnostics
services.description: Accurate computer diagnostics to pinpoint the real issue fast.

services.name: Brakes & Rotors
services.description: Complete brake inspection, pads, rotors, and fluid service.

services.name: Oil & Maintenance
services.description: Fast oil changes and scheduled factory maintenance.

services.name: Engine Repair
services.description: From check-engine lights to major engine work, done right.

services.name: AC & Heating
services.description: Stay cool in the desert with expert AC service and repair.

services.name: Tires & Alignment
services.description: New tires, rotation, balancing, and precision alignment.

testimonials.text: They found the actual problem two other shops missed. Fair price too.
testimonials.author: Marcus D.

testimonials.text: Fast, straight-talking, and no upselling. Finally a shop I trust.
testimonials.author: Linda P.

testimonials.text: Warranty work was painless and they had me back on the road same day.
testimonials.author: Trevor S.

metaTitle: Redline Auto Repair — Auto Shop in Phoenix, AZ
metaDescription: ASE-certified auto repair in Phoenix, AZ. Honest diagnostics, fair pricing, and a nationwide warranty. Call for a free estimate.
